home.title: Welcome to the SMP
home.content:
Welcome to the official wiki for our Scripted SMP studio! Select an article on the left to learn about our lore, rules, and more.

Current Project: Hero Concept.

rules.title: Server Rules
rules.content:
• No Griefing: Respect other players' builds.
  • Scripting: Only approved client-side scripts are allowed.
  • Roleplay: Stay in character during lore events!

lore.title: Original Concept
lore.content: The original concept was about an item that broke apart and all the civilazations took a piece and dont comunicate to each other anymore. The antagonist is trying to steal all the object parts to unlock `the void`. While the protagonists are trying to collect all the parts to regain the peace. There were 4 main civilzation before we endet the production and also one side civilzation. Main civilzations:Overworld civilization,Nether civilization,Underground civilization and End civilization.
